scripts.preinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')){process.stderr.write('Use pnpm instead\n'); process.exit(1);} ['package-lock.json','yarn.lock'].forEach((file)=>{try{fs.unlinkSync(file);}catch{}});"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
